title: 3D Print 25 Benchies
description: Increase your 3D printing output! To complete this quest, print at least 25 Benchies.

dialogue.text: You've shown great progress with your 3D printing! Your next goal is to print 25 Benchies. Can you handle this nautical challenge?
Your printer will be humming for a while. Keep the builds running until you've amassed twenty-five sturdy little Benchies.
Twenty-five prints later and you've got a respectable armada. Each one is a testament to your patience and persistence.
Excellent job! Your fleet of Benchies is growing. Keep up the great work. I'll return with an even bigger challenge soon!
